articles.title: ‘I was overcome’: Conan O’Brien tells Jimmy Kimmel about ’emotional’ trip to Ireland
articles.description:
Conan O'Brien visited the site of his great-grandfather's former home in Ireland, an experience the Brookline described as "emotional" and "powerful."

The post ‘I was overcome’: Conan O’Brien tells Jimmy Kimmel about ’emotional’ trip to Ireland appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Conan O'Brien visited his great-grandfather's home in Ireland, sharing an emotional experience.
O'Brien, a Brookline native, described the trip as 'powerful' during his talk with Jimmy Kimmel.
The visit highlights the cultural connections Boston residents have with their Irish heritage.

articles.title: San Francisco’s Chinatown celebrated Eileen Gu. Others are more conflicted.
articles.description:
Conservatives have rebuked Gu, who was born in the United States but won Olympic medals for China. The reaction has sparked conversations among Chinese Americans about identity and straddling two worlds.

The post San Francisco’s Chinatown celebrated Eileen Gu. Others are more conflicted. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Eileen Gu, a U.S.-born Olympic medalist, faces mixed reactions from Chinese Americans.
Conservative backlash highlights identity struggles among Chinese Americans in Boston and beyond.
Discussions on cultural identity may influence local community dynamics and perspectives.

articles.title: Somerville YMCA alters expansion plans after family refuses to sell their home
articles.description:
SOMERVILLE — Again and again they have asked. And every time, the answer has been the same: No. For several years, leadership at the Somerville YMCA has tried to strike a deal with its neighbor, an unassuming two-story home at the corner of Highland Avenue and School Street. Their plan to replace the city’s crumbling […]

The post Somerville YMCA alters expansion plans after family refuses to sell their home appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Somerville YMCA alters expansion plans after family declines to sell their home.

Local residents may face delays in improvements to the YMCA facilities.

articles.title: UMass men’s basketball stuns undefeated Miami (Ohio) in MAC Tournament

Boston residents can celebrate UMass's performance as they advance in the tournament.
